source_summary: A podcast interview about AI automation honesty.

insights.title: Only automate what you deeply understand

resolutions.one_line: Automate only processes you deeply understand — automating ignorance scales mistakes.
resolutions.standard: Max warns that automating what you don't understand just makes failures faster and harder to debug. First build the manual process, then automate.

resolutions.one_line: Your best hires are users who already love and understand your product.
resolutions.standard: Gumloop converts power users into team members. They already know the product, believe in the mission, and require less onboarding.
